title: Nutty, Light Almond Crumble
description: A delightful and nostalgic Argentinian dish featuring almond paste, toast, and a light crumble that's perfect for breakfast or dessert.

ingredients.name: Almond Paste
ingredients.notes: Place almond paste at room temperature

ingredients.name: Toasted Almonds
ingredients.notes: Make sure they are toasted and cooled down before use

instructions: Mix almond paste and granulated sugar until it forms a smooth dough.
Crush toasted almonds into small pieces using a mortar and pestle or food processor.
Add crushed almonds to the almond paste mixture. Mix until evenly combined, ensuring there are no large lumps of almonds left.
Transfer the crumb mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake in preheated oven for 10-12 minutes or until golden brown and crisp.
Let it cool completely before serving. Enjoy as a dessert or breakfast topping.
